snippets.title: AppPlatform listApplications Sample
snippets.description: Lists Applications in a given project and location.

snippets.title: AppPlatform getApplication Sample
snippets.description: Gets details of a single Application.

snippets.title: AppPlatform createApplication Sample
snippets.description: Creates a new Application in a given project and location.

snippets.title: AppPlatform updateApplication Sample
snippets.description: Updates the parameters of a single Application.

snippets.title: AppPlatform deleteApplication Sample
snippets.description: Deletes a single Application.

snippets.title: AppPlatform deployApplication Sample
snippets.description: Deploys a single Application.

snippets.title: AppPlatform undeployApplication Sample
snippets.description: Undeploys a single Application.

snippets.title: AppPlatform addApplicationStreamInput Sample
snippets.description: Adds target stream input to the Application. If the Application is deployed, the corresponding new Application instance will be created. If the stream has already been in the Application, the RPC will fail.

snippets.title: AppPlatform removeApplicationStreamInput Sample
snippets.description: Remove target stream input to the Application, if the Application is deployed, the corresponding instance based will be deleted. If the stream is not in the Application, the RPC will fail.

snippets.title: AppPlatform updateApplicationStreamInput Sample
snippets.description: Update target stream input to the Application, if the Application is deployed, the corresponding instance based will be deployed. For CreateOrUpdate behavior, set allow_missing to true.

snippets.title: AppPlatform getInstance Sample
snippets.description: Gets details of a single Instance.

snippets.title: AppPlatform createApplicationInstances Sample
snippets.description: Adds target stream input to the Application. If the Application is deployed, the corresponding new Application instance will be created. If the stream has already been in the Application, the RPC will fail.

snippets.title: AppPlatform deleteApplicationInstances Sample
snippets.description: Remove target stream input to the Application, if the Application is deployed, the corresponding instance based will be deleted. If the stream is not in the Application, the RPC will fail.

snippets.title: AppPlatform updateApplicationInstances Sample
snippets.description: Adds target stream input to the Application. If the Application is deployed, the corresponding new Application instance will be created. If the stream has already been in the Application, the RPC will fail.

snippets.description: Deletes asset inside corpus.

snippets.title: AppPlatform uploadAsset Sample
snippets.description: Upload asset by specifing the asset Cloud Storage uri. For video warehouse, it requires users who call this API have read access to the cloud storage file. Once it is uploaded, it can be retrieved by GenerateRetrievalUrl API which by default, only can retrieve cloud storage files from the same project of the warehouse. To allow retrieval cloud storage files that are in a separate project, it requires to find the vision ai service account (Go to IAM, check checkbox to show "Include Google-provided role grants", search for "Cloud Vision AI Service Agent") and grant the read access of the cloud storage files to that service account.

snippets.title: AppPlatform generateRetrievalUrl Sample
snippets.description: Generates a signed url for downloading the asset. For video warehouse, please see comment of UploadAsset about how to allow retrieval of cloud storage files in a different project.

snippets.title: AppPlatform analyzeAsset Sample
snippets.description: Analyze asset to power search capability.

snippets.title: AppPlatform indexAsset Sample
snippets.description: Index one asset for search. Supported corpus type: Corpus.Type.VIDEO_ON_DEMAND

snippets.title: AppPlatform removeIndexAsset Sample
snippets.description: Remove one asset's index data for search. Supported corpus type: Corpus.Type.VIDEO_ON_DEMAND

snippets.title: AppPlatform updateIndex Sample
snippets.description: Updates an Index under the corpus. Users can perform a metadata-only update or trigger a full index rebuild with different update_mask values.

snippets.title: AppPlatform getIndex Sample
snippets.description: Gets the details of a single Index under a Corpus.

snippets.title: AppPlatform listIndexes Sample
snippets.description: List all Indexes in a given Corpus.

snippets.title: AppPlatform deleteIndex Sample
snippets.description: Delete a single Index. In order to delete an index, the caller must make sure that it is not deployed to any index endpoint.

snippets.title: AppPlatform ingestAsset Sample
snippets.description: Ingests data for the asset. It is not allowed to ingest a data chunk which is already expired according to TTL. This method is only available via the gRPC API (not HTTP since bi-directional streaming is not supported via HTTP).

snippets.title: AppPlatform clipAsset Sample
snippets.description: Supported by STREAM_VIDEO corpus type. Generates clips for downloading. The api takes in a time range, and generates a clip of the first content available after start_time and before end_time, which may overflow beyond these bounds. Returned clips are truncated if the total size of the clips are larger than 100MB.

snippets.title: AppPlatform generateHlsUri Sample
snippets.description: Generates a uri for an HLS manifest. The api takes in a collection of time ranges, and generates a URI for an HLS manifest that covers all the requested time ranges.

snippets.title: AppPlatform importAssets Sample
snippets.description: Imports assets (images plus annotations) from a meta file on cloud storage. Each row in the meta file is corresponding to an image (specified by a cloud storage uri) and its annotations.

snippets.title: AppPlatform createSearchConfig Sample
snippets.description: Creates a search configuration inside a corpus. Please follow the rules below to create a valid CreateSearchConfigRequest. --- General Rules --- 1. Request.search_config_id must not be associated with an existing    SearchConfig. 2. Request must contain at least one non-empty search_criteria_property or    facet_property. 3. mapped_fields must not be empty, and must map to existing UGA keys. 4. All mapped_fields must be of the same type. 5. All mapped_fields must share the same granularity. 6. All mapped_fields must share the same semantic SearchConfig match    options. For property-specific rules, please reference the comments for FacetProperty and SearchCriteriaProperty.

snippets.title: AppPlatform updateSearchConfig Sample
snippets.description: Updates a search configuration inside a corpus. Please follow the rules below to create a valid UpdateSearchConfigRequest. --- General Rules --- 1. Request.search_configuration.name must already exist. 2. Request must contain at least one non-empty search_criteria_property or facet_property. 3. mapped_fields must not be empty, and must map to existing UGA keys. 4. All mapped_fields must be of the same type. 5. All mapped_fields must share the same granularity. 6. All mapped_fields must share the same semantic SearchConfig match    options. For property-specific rules, please reference the comments for FacetProperty and SearchCriteriaProperty.

snippets.title: AppPlatform getSearchConfig Sample
snippets.description: Gets a search configuration inside a corpus.

snippets.title: AppPlatform deleteSearchConfig Sample
snippets.description: Deletes a search configuration inside a corpus. For a DeleteSearchConfigRequest to be valid, Request.search_configuration.name must already exist.

snippets.title: AppPlatform listSearchConfigs Sample
